name: clicky-signal-blue
description: Signal-blue palette for Clicky's optional §6.8 pointer overlay (arrow/ring assets). Not used by orchestration's §6.7 breadcrumb.

primary.role: arrow fill, ring stroke, the single confident color of the pointer

light.role: highlight edge, glow falloff, motion trail

deep.role: shadow edge, contact shading where the tip meets the icon

charcoal.role: outline/stroke on light Explorer backgrounds for contrast

paper.role: outline/stroke or fill on dark Explorer backgrounds for contrast
